description: This file defines the ErrorEnvelopeMiddleware class, which handles error conversion and response formatting in an ASP.NET Core application, standardizing error responses into a BRD-aligned envelope with correlation ID, category, message, and errors.

classes.name: ErrorEnvelopeMiddleware
classes.description: Middleware class that intercepts HTTP responses to convert errors into a standardized BRD-aligned error envelope.

methods.name: InvokeAsync
methods.description: Main middleware method that processes the HTTP context, catches exceptions, and formats error responses.

methods.name: HandleExceptionAsync
methods.description: Handles exceptions by logging and writing an error envelope with appropriate status code and category.

methods.name: WriteErrorAsync
methods.description: Constructs and writes the error envelope JSON response with correlation ID, category, message, and errors.

search-terms: Convert errors into BRD-aligned error envelope
